task_description: Fix multiple issues: add dark/light mode toggle to landing page nav, fix card text visibility in dark mode, fix Pomodoro start button not working from non-dashboard pages, fix task tripling bug, improve Spotify music button UI, verify Spotify playlist URL wiring from settings

verification.summary: pnpm lint passes with no warnings/errors. pnpm build succeeds, all pages compile. No test failures (pnpm test runs with --passWithNoTests). Semantic review (v1) identified 4 latent edge cases (title collision for same-named tasks, unused focusTask state, prefix heuristic, multi-tab race) - none are regressions and all are acceptable for the user's reported scenario.
